overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from a space simulation, showing a spacecraft in orbit above Earth with detailed atmospheric scattering and cloud formations. The view transitions from an external planetary observation to a first-person cockpit perspective featuring holographic HUD displays and pilot hands.

scene_state.functional_zone: spacecraft exterior viewport in Earth orbit

agents.ego_description: pilot slowly panning the camera across Earth's surface, observing the cloud formations and atmospheric curvature from orbit

entered.detail: Blue and white planet with detailed cloud formations, curved horizon, and atmospheric scattering
Metallic gray angular wing structure of the spacecraft in the foreground
Bright blue atmospheric limb glow along the edge of the planet
Distant stars scattered across the blackness of space

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a serene view of Earth from orbit, showing the planet's curvature against the blackness of space. The spacecraft's wing structure is visible in the foreground as the camera slowly pans right, revealing the thin blue line of the atmosphere and scattered cloud formations below.

scene_state.functional_zone: spacecraft cockpit with holographic flight controls

events.description: camera pans right from Earth view to reveal interior cockpit with glowing holographic HUD displays

agents.ego_description: pilot viewing holographic flight instruments and radar display, with hands visible resting on the control panel at the end of the segment

entered.detail: Orange-amber holographic display panels showing flight data, targeting reticles, and ship status information
Dark metallic structural elements and window frame of the spacecraft cockpit interior

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues panning right, the Earth moves out of view and the spacecraft's interior cockpit comes into focus. Holographic amber-tinted HUD elements illuminate the scene, displaying radar, targeting systems, and flight telemetry. The segment ends with the pilot's hands coming into view, resting on the control interface against the backdrop of deep space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a wide planetary observation in deep space to the intimate interior of a spacecraft cockpit. It begins with a serene view of Earth's curvature and scattered cloud formations, with the spacecraft's wing structure framing the foreground as the camera slowly pans right. As the planet gradually slides out of view, the perspective shifts inward, moving from the void of space into the ship's cabin. The scene then opens up to reveal amber-tinted holographic HUD elements displaying radar and flight telemetry, which illuminate the dark interior. Finally, the camera settles on the pilot's hands resting on the control interface against the backdrop of the distant stars.
